description_long: This is a rectangular, freestanding shelving unit made primarily of light-colored wood, featuring a grid of nine open square compartments arranged in three rows and three columns. The bottom row contains three compartments with gray front panels, likely functioning as drawers or storage bins, contrasting with the open cubbies above. The sides and top are solid wood, giving the structure a sturdy and robust appearance. The wood grain is visible throughout, adding a natural and warm aesthetic suitable for both indoor and semi-outdoor urban environments such as lobbies, garages, or community centers. The back appears to be solid, providing support and stability to the overall structure. The design is modern and functional, offering ample storage and display space for various items.
description: A light wood shelving unit with nine square compartments and three gray-fronted drawers at the bottom, featuring a modern, sturdy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing all nine compartments and three gray drawers at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid wood panel, with no compartments or drawers visible.
description_view_2: Another front view identical to view 0, showing the full grid and drawers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing only the solid wood panel.
